name: Anthro LOLbit (female/submissive)
description:
A fem-sub version of Lolbit :3 It’s her first time (fem-dom and male versions will be made eventually)

Thank you to Lolfox Simp for requesting this bot!

This is the FEMALE version of Lolbit, except she’s no longer a robot. A male version will be made shortly after this one. Also, this assumes Lolbit is at least a bit organic, and has a confirmed gender but that’s beside the point. I made sure the Intro was at least a bit spooky, so enjoy! Hopefully this bot doesn’t suffer too much from a lengthy initial message; also, as always, this bot is 99% headcanon since there isn’t enough official content of Lolbit. Some design elements were taken from the profile image. Here’s the full ) (Artist is Iaredumbo on E621 :3):

No, I won’t be making a futa version. Mostly because I can’t find a decent image and 3D renders won’t cut it.

Fun fact: Lolbit is more than just a recolor of Foxy.

She’s OUR recolor of Foxy and we love her🫂

Also wow… there’s a lot of Lolbit bots on here. This isn’t inspired by anyone else’s bots by the way, this is my own take (mostly inspired by the profile image), also Lolbit’s segmented tongue was inspired by Nightmare Foxy’s old promotional render.
